ProjectSpecification.Summary: A comprehensive scientific calculator application that performs advanced mathematical operations, including trigonometric, exponential, and logarithmic functions, and supports user profiles for saving calculations and history.

UserRole.Name: Admin
UserRole.Description: Responsible for managing user accounts and application settings.
UserRole.Permissions: Manage users, update application settings, view calculation history

UserRole.Name: StandardUser
UserRole.Description: Can perform calculations, save favorites, and view personal calculation history.
UserRole.Permissions: Perform calculations, save favorites, view personal history

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Basic Arithmetic Operations
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Support addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Trigonometric Operations
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Support sine, cosine, and tangent functions.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Exponential and Logarithmic Operations
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Support exponential and logarithmic functions, including base change.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Statistical Operations
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Support mean, median, mode, and standard deviation calculations.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: User Profile Management
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Allow users to create profiles, save calculations, and view history.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Calculation History
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Store and display calculation history for each user.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Favorite Calculations
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Allow users to save frequently used calculations for quick access.

Page.Name: Calculator
Page.Description: Main calculator interface with buttons for numbers, operators, and functions.

Component.Name: ButtonPanel
Component.Description: Contains buttons for numbers, operators, and functions.

Page.Name: History
Page.Description: Displays calculation history for the current user.

Component.Name: HistoryList
Component.Description: Lists previous calculations with dates and results.

Page.Name: Favorites
Page.Description: Displays saved favorite calculations for the current user.

Component.Name: FavoritesList
Component.Description: Lists saved favorite calculations with names and formulas.

Page.Name: Settings
Page.Description: Allows users to manage their profiles and application settings.

Component.Name: UserProfile
Component.Description: Displays user profile information and allows editing.

Component.Name: ApplicationSettings
Component.Description: Allows users to customize application settings, such as theme and precision.

Entity.Name: Calculations
Entity.Description: Stores calculation history for each user.

Attribute.Name: UserID
Attribute.Description: Foreign key referencing the Users entity.

Attribute.Name: Formula
Attribute.Description: Mathematical formula used for the calculation.

Attribute.Name: Timestamp
Attribute.Description: Timestamp when the calculation was performed.

Entity.Name: Favorites
Entity.Description: Stores saved favorite calculations for each user.

Attribute.Name: UserID
Attribute.Description: Foreign key referencing the Users entity.

Attribute.Name: Formula
Attribute.Description: Mathematical formula used for the favorite calculation.

Attribute.Name: Name
Attribute.Description: User-chosen name for the favorite calculation.
